data.body: Consideration: [Docs] Full docs update surface includes: (1) plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md (authoritative subcommand reference); (2) CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table; (3) llms.txt if it enumerates ticket CLI subcommands; (4) plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md if it enumerates the dispatcher case statement; (5) the dispatcher _usage() help text in plugins/dso/scripts/ticket so bare-invocation help lists the new subcommands. Dispatcher _usage() is the highest-leverage surface because users discover subcommands via bare 'ticket' invocation. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
